objective: Reproduce and fix the elastic/beats kafka major alias issue in a disposable VM

setup.name: add repro test

patches.name: map alias 4 to latest supported 4.x
patches.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('libbeat/common/kafka/version.go')
s = p.read_text()
old = '\t\t"4":   sarama.V4_0_0_0,\n\t\t"4.0": sarama.V4_0_0_0,\n\t\t"4.1": sarama.V4_1_0_0,\n'
new = '\t\t"4":   sarama.V4_1_0_0,\n\t\t"4.0": sarama.V4_0_0_0,\n\t\t"4.1": sarama.V4_1_0_0,\n'
if old not in s:
    raise SystemExit('target text not found')
p.write_text(s.replace(old, new))
PY
